capabilities: Integrate threat modeling with agent-based planning to identify and mitigate potential security threats in software systems.

procedure.action: Conduct STRIDE analysis on system architecture diagrams to identify potential threats using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Invoke DREAD model to prioritize identified threats based on impact and likelihood by invoking the target API with the specified parameters; assert response_status < 400 and response_time_ms < 5000; log request_id and response_code.

Incorporate OWASP ASVS criteria to define security requirements and metrics using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Simulate threat scenarios using agent-based models to validate threat coverage using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Inspect threat model with cross-functional teams to ensure comprehensive risk assessment by applying the checklist line by line; assert mandatory_item_fail_count < 1; log review_duration_ms and reviewer_id to review_log.

summary: Integrate systematic threat modeling with agent planning to enhance software security. Establish success metrics and validation steps to ensure comprehensive threat coverage and effective mitigation strategies.
title: Systematic Threat Modeling for Software Security Planning

failureConditions: Unidentified threats lead to security breaches; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
Inadequate threat prioritization results in resource misallocation.

Lack of validation leads to incomplete threat coverage; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
successConditions: All identified threats are documented and prioritized; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Security requirements meet OWASP ASVS standards; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Threat scenarios are validated through agent-based simulations; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
